name:
I'm on top of a hill. Below is Pirates Island. Across the sea
way off in the distance I see Treasure Island
description:
I'm on top of a hill. Below is Pirates Island. Across the sea
way off in the distance I see Treasure Island
items_start: Rock wall with narrow crack in it
hints: From here you can see Treasure Island in the distance. The crack in the wall may lead somewhere.
GO CRACK to enter the narrow crack and reach the underground cavern with building materials.
GO CRACK leads to the cavern (room 17) with sails and lumber. DOWN returns to the hill foot (room 14).
notes: Hilltop viewpoint showing Treasure Island across the sea. The crack in the rock connects to the underground cavern (room 17). DOWN returns to the hill foot (room 14). You need a boat to reach Treasure Island.
